meta.title: Res Publica
meta.description: Res Publica — a shared space for public discourse and civic engagement.

home.heading: Res Publica
home.subheading: A shared space for public discourse and civic engagement.

about.title: About
about.heading: About Res Publica
about.intro: Res Publica is a civic organization dedicated to strengthening public discourse and democratic participation.
paragraphs: We bring together researchers, practitioners, and citizens to examine the institutions and practices that sustain a healthy public sphere.
Founded on the belief that informed, engaged communities are the foundation of resilient democracies, we work across disciplines and borders toward that goal.

mission.heading: Our Mission
mission.body: To foster informed public debate and equip citizens and institutions with the knowledge they need to participate meaningfully in civic life.

vision.heading: Our Vision
vision.body: A society in which public discourse is inclusive, evidence-based, and open to all voices.
